homeInfo.title: Audio Quality Evaluation
homeInfo.message:
Welcome to this audio quality evaluation test.

You will listen to 11 audio samples and answer 2 questions about each one.
Please use headphones and ensure you are in a quiet environment.

For each question, rate the audio on a scale from 1 (worst) to 7 (best).

Click the button below when you are ready to begin.

questions.name: Sample 1
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: solo acoustic nylon string guitar playing in a fingerstyle Brazilian bossa nova style.

prompts.0: How correct is the information in the caption with relation to the audio? Rate on a scale from 1 (worst, incorrect information) to 7 (best, accurate information)
prompts.1: Does this description contain information that is unrelated to the audio clip? Rate on a scale from 1 (entire caption completely unrelated to the audio clip) to 7 (completely related)

questions.name: Sample 2
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This lively Latin dance track features a rich male vocalist singing over groovy rhythms driven by trumpet, accordion, and percussion. The medium tempo creates an energetic yet romantic atmosphere, ideal for a festive celebration or a bustling nightclub. Although the upload tags suggest a rock genre, the musical content clearly aligns with traditional Latin dance styles.
questions.id: /projects/adasp/mir/Internet_Archive_Dataset_v0/items/l/o/los-gedientos-del-rock-en-vivo-en-paraguay-2003/Los Gedientos Del Rock - En Vivo En Paraguay (2003)/06 - soy pata de lana_00001.mp3

questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This instrumental composition skillfully blends Latin Jazz, World Music, and Game Soundtrack styles to create a lively and upbeat piece. The track features syncopated rhythms driven by diverse percussion instruments like mallets and synthesizers, resulting in a cheerful and lighthearted mood well-suited for video games or animated films.

questions.name: Sample 4
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This piece serves as a minimalist orchestral soundtrack where the bassoon and cello create a somber foundation supported by a steady, slow rhythm. A piano adds layers of tension to the dark, ominous atmosphere, making it ideal for scenes of intense dread in a horror movie. Despite some metadata suggesting electronic synthesizers, the core sound relies on traditional string instruments to build its unsettling mood.

questions.name: Sample 5
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This instrumental piece blends folk and easy listening influences, featuring a steady guitar and piano that create a melancholic yet relaxing atmosphere. The addition of violin strings adds elegance to the soothing soundscape, making it an ideal choice for quiet reflection or a peaceful evening. Although computer-generated, the music captures a warm, intimate mood reminiscent of traditional acoustic ballads.

questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This acoustic piece features a lively, guitar-driven melody that creates an uplifting and engaging sense of forward motion. The steady rhythm supports the folk-inspired sound, making it suitable for a cheerful campfire gathering or a countryside road trip. While related songs suggest a festive or reflective mood, this specific segment stands out as an energetic instrumental highlight from a parody cover band.

questions.name: Sample 7
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This instrumental piece serves as an ideal backing track for guitar lessons, highlighting the elegance of fingerstyle techniques and detailed fingerpicking patterns. The arrangement relies primarily on acoustic guitar to create a focused listening experience that emphasizes complex chord progressions without vocal distractions. Although originally recorded during a live bluegrass performance featuring multiple instruments, this specific segment isolates the intricate guitar work essential for instructional purposes.

CAPTION:

A male vocalist delivers rapping vocals in a higher register over a dark keyboard sample that creates a tense, foreboding atmosphere. The composition is well-suited for crime thriller soundtracks, particularly during scenes involving suspense or planning.

questions.name: About You
questions.description: Please tell us about your musical background.

fields.label: How many years of musical experience do you have?
Please describe your musical experience (instruments played, training, listening habits, etc.)
fields.placeholder: e.g. I've played piano for 10 years and studied music theory in college...
